sections.heading: Goal
sections.text: Complete all five rows on the board. Each row must form a valid dice pattern — Straight (five in a row), Full House, Five of a Kind, and others.

sections.heading: Dice
sections.text: Click a die to select it. Double-click an unlocked die to reroll it. Adjacent unlocked dice can be swapped using your switch allowance.

sections.heading: Rows & powers
sections.text: When a row completes, those dice lock. Earn charges for pattern powers by completing rows with the matching pattern. Tap a power on the dock to activate it, then follow the on-screen hint.

sections.heading: Levels & hearts
sections.text: Clear every row to finish the level. Pick a new power on level-up (up to three in your loadout). You have limited switches and rerolls each level. Run out of moves and you lose a heart — lose all hearts and the gym run ends.

sections.heading: Gyms
sections.text: Each gym orb on the map changes the rules — ordered rerolls, safari countdowns, tighter loadouts, and more. Hover an orb to read its rules. Earn that gym's badge by beating level 8.

sections.heading: Championship
sections.text: Collect every gym badge to unlock the portal. Pick three powers, then beat three special opponents in a row to become Dice Champion.
